entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, a legume crop collected and observed in Tanzania

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: Country where chickpea germplasm was collected and observed

entities.name: ARUSHA
entities.description: City in Tanzania where the National Plant Genetic Resources Centre is located

entities.name: NATIONAL PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES CENTRE
entities.description: Organization in Arusha, Tanzania involved in collecting chickpea germplasm

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International organization involved in the joint collecting mission for chickpea

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material of chickpea collected during the mission

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Farming methods observed during the collecting mission

entities.name: COLLECTING MISSION
entities.description: Joint effort to collect chickpea accessions in Tanzania

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per unit area, observed at 1.0-1.5 t/ha

entities.name: LODGING
entities.description: The tendency of plants to fall over, which chickpea was found to be free from

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by lack of water, which chickpea survived

entities.name: INSECT DAMAGE
entities.description: Harm caused by insects, found to have low incidence in chickpea

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: Pathological conditions, found to have low incidence in chickpea

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production which can be improved through cultural practices

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Management techniques used in cultivation to improve productivity
